title: borreria rubricaulis
intro: Borreria rubricaulis, also known as redstem borreria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Borreria rubricaulis include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, Borreria rubricaulis is often made into a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it can also be used as a topical treatment by applying a poultice to the affected area.
